creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #67)
> waybar-0.9.2_1.log

Can I get the error log? x11/waybar doesn't use GCC directly but defines USES=compiler:c++17-lang, and Clang 11 defaulting to -fno-common didn't trigger bustage.

http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/latest-per-pkg/waybar/0.9.4_1/head-amd64-default.log
